title: lint_off waiver ignored -- regression between 5.024 and 5.036
body:
I found this waiver works for ignoring a missing module using `--lint-only` mode in 5.024 but not for 5.036.

```
`verilator_config
lint_off -file "*.sv" -match "Cannot find file containing module: 'some_module_name'"
```

I'll try to make a test-regress example now to demonstrate.
